features: Improve your home fragrance for up to 6 weeks
description: Product Description Air Wick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long lasting fragrances and improve your home fragrance for up to 6 weeks. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home whether it's in your living room or bedroom with its nature-inspired fragrance and elegant design. Air Freshener. Airwick. Ingredients CONTAINS; 4-TERTBUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, 3-butoxypropan-2-ol, Distillates (petroleum), hydro- treated light, PHENETHYL ALCOHOL, 3,5,5-trimethylhexyl acetate, 2,6-DIMETHYL-7-OCTEN2-OL, NEROL, tetrahydro-2-isobutyl4-methylpyran-4-ol, mixed isomers (cis and trans), (E)-.beta.-Ionone, MIXED IONONES, BENZYL ACETATE, 3-HEXENOL, DIMETHYLTETRAHYDRO BENZALDEHYDE, 3-CYCLOHEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, CITRAL, CITRONELLOL, GERANIOL, CIS-3-HEXENYL SALICYLATE, PHENYLACETALDEHYDE, EUGENOL, TRANS-ROSE KETONE-1, 2,6-Dimethyl-5-heptenal, 1-(5,5-Dimethyl1-cyclohexen-1-yl)pent4-en-1-one, ROSE KETONE-4, METHYL OCTINE CARBONATE
